items.title: Competition from Chinese imports is causing CO₂ emissions to rise globally, research reveals

items.title: The Sun may not engulf Earth after all, scientists say
items.summary: Need some good news on a Friday after a long week? The Earth may not be engulfed by the expanding fireball of the dying sun, which has long been assumed to be our home planet's ultimate fate, according to scientists.
